message:
refactor(test): update Ollama e2e test imports to use crate alias and explicit runtime import

Update e2e_ollama_live.rs to use the `pi` crate alias instead of
`pi_agent_rust` for model, models, provider, and providers imports,
matching the crate rename that landed in Cargo.toml. Also import
RuntimeBuilder explicitly from asupersync::runtime rather than using
the fully-qualified path inline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
